creator: draco@marino.st
text:
I tried to fix this with the following patch, but debian.org denies the 
request with a "not acceptable" response.

--- Makefile.orig       2013-06-14 09:57:24.000000000 +0000
+++ Makefile
@@ -4,7 +4,7 @@
  PORTNAME=      po4a
  PORTVERSION=   0.44
  CATEGORIES=    textproc perl5
-MASTER_SITES=  http://alioth.debian.org/frs/download.php/3341/
+MASTER_SITES=  http://alioth.debian.org/frs/download.php/file/3786/

  MAINTAINER=    garga@FreeBSD.org
  COMMENT=       Brings gettext translation tools to all kinds of docs
